creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
Again, my apologies. Imake is uglier than I first believed and it looks
like we won't be able to please all of the people all of the time.

Please ignore my _second_ set of diffs (which don't work for the case
where CFLAGS is set!) and apply the _first_ set. I was trying to please
what I imagine must be a very small minority and it didn't pay off.

Apologies for the back'n'forth dance.
